creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Hi Max,

Sorry for my late response. I was struggling to get the rc.d script to behave and fix your issue. With the update to 4.4.3 I also reworked that script so it should always write the pidfile to /var/run (no sub-directory) and since it uses /usr/sbin/daemon now, I chose to use the -r parameter so it will restart the recursor if it dies for any reason.

Hope that helps with the issue you were having.

Cheers,
Ralf
